transcript.text: First of all, before any other consideration, opinion,
discussion, my most sincere congratulations to Comoo, because
it's a team that always manages to amaze
me, always manages to somehow capture my attention.
Today, in front of me, there are the
two teams that can teach us more than
anyone, they can teach us how much the
project really counts.
To have a project, to carry it forward,
to aim for it, to give it continuity
and then try to collect the results.
Because many times you reproach Comoo, but it's
a team that spends money, because in recent
years Juventus has spent little.
So we have in front of us, we
can make a comparison, and Juventus on the
first occasion immediately threw everything into the air,
we change coach, we renew, we do, we
say.
The two teams, Comoo on one side, Juventus
on the other, explain to us what a
project is, how to work and how, instead,
to take the wrong path.
And we discuss it, we do it.
Before, as usual, if you want, I invite
you to thumbs up to satisfy the algorithm
friend, subscribe if you want to follow the
next contents, in a little while we will
also see Inter committed to Lecce, obviously, so
I'm waiting for you in the post-match,
in the description you will find all the
social profiles.
And as usual, thank you, thank you for
your support, that really never misses.
Let me talk a little bit about Comoo,
because I often feel a certain reluctance
towards Fabregas, some behaviors that I don't like
either, we talked about it, the one against
Milan, but then wanting to attack him also
in other areas, the football one, and make
him pass almost like a coach who is
good only because he has a team that
supports him.
No, no, there is a 360 degree cohesion,
there is a team that today is fighting
for the Champions League.
I have always said, but at the end
of the fair, Comoo, I still don't see
him ready for that step, and if he
beats Juventus at the stadium, he doesn't waste
a bit of time at the stadium, it
means that he is honestly in that fight,
it doesn't mean that he will be in
the first four places, absolutely, the road is
very long, but he is there.
So, for me, he is fully committed to
this fight, and to do so means that
all the components have worked well.
It's a team that the other day was
in Serie B, you can have the money,
you can have what you want, but we
have seen it, only with the money, you
don't get the results if there is no
competence, if there is no preparation, if there
is no capacity, you don't get the results,
you don't get them.
And today, beat Juventus without the best, without
the theoretically strongest player, the most important, Nico
Paz, and you do it by playing divinely.
Como is a team that doesn't give you
anything, and the fact that Como doesn't give
you anything is not easy, because now he
turns it around, going to Juventus.
In the second game, this team scored with
macroscopic mistakes, mistakes that you say, but can
you make these levels, these mistakes?
And rightly, people will now focus once again
on De Gregorio, who must be said, is
not at the level of commitment, he is
not at the level of being a goalkeeper
of a high-ranking team.
Then maybe one day he will become, I
don't know, he is not really an inherited
boy of Gregorio, but at the moment he
is not of that level, because in the
very first shot where you can react in
a different way, and there are really many.
Then, be careful, sometimes you come out even
with good saves, but you can see that
he is not of that level.
Everything here is a discourse that we at
Inter do, for example, with Sommer, there are
goalkeepers who are normal goalkeepers, and I feel
like saying about Gregorio, he is almost back
in this category, but he is not the
only one.
In my opinion, this must also be understood,
he is not the only one, because, I
don't know if you have noticed, the ball
that McKinney loses, that ball in the middle
between Locatelli and the player of Como, these
are serious mistakes, even those serious mistakes on
the first goal of Inter, where even there
we only talk about Gregorio, but have you
seen David, what a ball he loses?
These are serious mistakes for the category.
The ball that Locatelli loses against Lazio, these
are serious mistakes, and Como does not commit
these mistakes, or if he commits them, not
with this frequency.
These things make the difference, they absolutely make
the difference.
Players who are not up to the task,
guys, today Openda, I don't know what happened
to this guy, he won't have faith, I
don't know, in the first half, there you
can jump the goalkeeper and make the most
difficult play, I don't know.
It is an Juventus that we have seen
today, there is not, even Juventus today had
important absences, if behind Bremer is missing, and
in addition to Bremer, Calulo too, and he
would not have deserved to be present in
this game, Calulo must be absolutely said, it
is a fragile Juventus, a Juventus that breaks
down, and it is a team that, in
my opinion, lacks, and also lacks quality, guys,
there is little to do, because at this
moment one says, but the coach, how many
times has the coach changed?
What can the coach do on macroscopic errors
like the ones we are continuing to see?
What can he do?
Can he put everyone behind?
But have you seen how he plays the
combo?
But have you seen how easy it is?
With what ease, he comes out, turns the
ball, the counter is perfect in the second
half, it's amazing, but you have to work
on it, and you have to go to
the market to find those players who do
that.
Today I hear that Spalletti, in my opinion,
does not have the right players to develop
what he wants to do, and maybe in
this regard, yes, maybe today Juventus' coach would
be better, more defensive, I do not know,
but certainly there is a lack of quality
to play with the ball, because it cannot
be, there is nothing random, there cannot be
randomness in constantly seeing macroscopic errors that every
time are there, evident, and are repeated, and
are repeated, and are repeated, and then, above
all, when we talk about projectuality, we are
talking about this, you take a coach, he
must be followed, he must be supported, what
he asks for, what he wants, otherwise it
makes little sense, and this is where Fabregas
is advantaged, in this respect, he certainly is,
because Fabregas, even if not with ready players,
players who will become it, on whom you
can work, it is not that Fabregas bought
Ilditz himself, the turn phenomenon, he already has
Nikopass, for God's sake, but we have seen
that he goes beyond Nikopass, today we have
not really noticed it, and this is what
Fabregas has advantaged, because there, at ease, you
follow a project, you marry it, you follow
what the coach asks, you go ahead, you
go straight, and then the coach capable in
an environment like this, is consequently ennobled, this
seems absolutely clear to me.
Nothing guys, the Champions League fight that becomes
beautiful, becomes beautiful, because now even Atalanta could
re-enter the games, now they are in
front of Napoli, so it was difficult, but
they are there, Como, Roma, Juve, they are
there, and I also repeat Atalanta 6, so
a season finale really, really, really interesting, and
that's why we have to be grateful in
seeing teams like Como, we don't have to
be accusers, we don't have to denigrate, we
just have to be grateful, and I feel
like I am totally grateful, and therefore projects
like the one with Masco are welcome, without
a shadow of a doubt.
A big hug to Nischio, ladies and gentlemen.
